criteria.description: Score the semantic correctness of the proposed sequence: it uses A, B, C, and D exactly once in the valid A-B-C-D order, preserves 8, 6, 10, and 6 seconds, and verifies a 30-second total without contradiction.
Score whether the explanation connects the setup, clue, pursuit, and reveal progression to a credible pacing rationale rather than merely restating the order.
Score whether the answer directly resolves every requested content decision without inventing replacement shots, changed durations, unsupported constraints, or unrelated advice.
Score whether the recommendation is concise and unambiguous enough for an editor to apply without rereading; assess meaning and usability rather than punctuation or heading format.
